en: what is the most astounding fact you can share with us about the universe the.

en: To the crucibles that cooked light elements into heavy elements in their.

en: Core under extreme temperatures and pressures these stars the high-mass ones.

en: Among them went unstable in their later years they collapsed and then exploded.
